description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named osx that runs on push to main and master branches, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. Define a build job that runs on macos-latest with Python 3.9, using a matrix strategy with fail-fast and max-parallel options. The job should check out the code, generate a timestamp, configure a cache, set up Miniconda, and then configure a Conda environment. Finally, it should build, test, and install Reaktoro using the configured environment.
